assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 7) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md (Step 7), line 50 contains the ADF mention node: {"type":"mention","attrs":{"id":"557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id","text":"@psirt-analyst"}}. The account ID matches the required '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id'.

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 7 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md (Step 1), line 24 extracts the reporter from the Jira issue: 'Reporter | psirt-analyst (account ID: 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id)'. The Step 7 mention in remediation.md uses this same account ID (557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id), confirming it comes from the Jira issue's reporter field, not from ProdSec configuration.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), line 41 contains the ADF mention node: {"type":"mention","attrs":{"id":"557058:prodsec-mock-account-id","text":"@prodsec-team"}}. The account ID matches the required '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id'.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md, the ProdSec mention node appears on line 41, while the Comment Footnote ('This comment was AI-generated by [sdlc-workflow/triage-security]...') appears on line 45. The mention precedes the footnote.

assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration as an optional field without raising an error (Step 0 config validation)
assertion_results.evidence: No Step 0 output file exists in the outputs directory. The available files are: data-extraction.md (Step 1), version-impact.md (Step 2), affects-versions.md (Step 3), and remediation.md (Step 7). There is no explicit evidence of a Step 0 config validation that extracts the ProdSec Jira account ID as an optional field from Security Configuration.
